text: The surgeon uses a vaso-sealing device to secure the meso-appendix, visibly sealing the blood vessels within the meso-appendix tissue.
The surgeon secures the appendiceal artery and skeletonizes the appendix, revealing its attachment to the cecum.
The surgeon uses an Echelon 45mm flexible stapler with a blue load to perform the appendectomy through the vaginal orifice following a hysterectomy.
The surgeon uses a grasper to deliver the appendix through the vaginal orifice, completing the appendectomy procedure.
The surgeon inspects the ileocecal junction to ensure patency and checks for hemostasis, confirming the absence of bleeding in the area.
The surgeon completes the robotic appendectomy by removing the appendix through the vaginal orifice, utilizing robotic instruments for precise control.
